args.query:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days_to_close
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON REPLACE(c.accountid, '#', '') = REPLACE(a.Id, '#', '')
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_days_to_close ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days_to_close
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON REPLACE(c.accountid, '#', '') = REPLACE(a.Id, '#', '')
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_days_to_close ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "I\u2019m unable to reliably compute state-level case closure times because I can\u2019t join support cases to account state data across the separate databases with the tools available here, and the case date fields in the support database are stored as text in a way that\u2019s blocking date arithmetic and filtering. As a result, I can\u2019t determine which state has the quickest closure time over the past 6 quarters from this environment."

args.answer: I’m unable to reliably compute state-level case closure times because I can’t join support cases to account state data across the separate databases with the tools available here, and the case date fields in the support database are stored as text in a way that’s blocking date arithmetic and filtering. As a result, I can’t determine which state has the quickest closure time over the past 6 quarters from this environment.

val_args.answer: I’m unable to reliably compute state-level case closure times because I can’t join support cases to account state data across the separate databases with the tools available here, and the case date fields in the support database are stored as text in a way that’s blocking date arithmetic and filtering. As a result, I can’t determine which state has the quickest closure time over the past 6 quarters from this environment.
